subject: fix(mobile): constrain bottom sheet scroll area to visible snap region
body:
Bottom sheet content was rendered in a scroll container sized to the full 85vh
sheet height. At SNAP_HALF (50vh visible), the bottom ~35vh of scrollable
content extended below the viewport, making it invisible even when scrolled
to the end. Now the content max-height is dynamically set to match the current
snap point, ensuring all content is always reachable within the visible area.

Tags: mobile, ui, bottomsheet, scroll
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
